menu_subtitle: Rule the realm with a single word.
npc_no_response: I... cannot answer right now, my lord.
event_orc_raid_desc_1: Orc scouts have been spotted near the northern border. A raid is imminent!
event_orc_raid_desc_2: Smoke rises from the tree line — orcs are burning the outer farms!
event_orc_raid_desc_3: A warhorn echoes across the valley. The orcs are coming!
event_orc_raid_desc_4: Villagers flee toward the castle, pursued by orc raiders!
event_conflict_desc_1: Two of your vassals are at each other's throats over a land dispute.
event_conflict_desc_2: A quarrel has erupted in the castle hall. Your people look to you to judge.
event_conflict_desc_3: Tempers flare among your court. If ignored, it may turn violent.
event_visitor_desc: A hooded stranger has appeared at the castle gates, seeking an audience.
event_famine_desc: The castle granary is running dangerously low. The people are beginning to starve.
event_fire_desc: Fire has broken out in the castle storage! Quick action is needed to prevent catastrophic loss!
event_rebellion_desc: Disgruntled citizens have gathered in the courtyard, demanding change. Tensions are rising.
event_weather_desc: A violent storm batters the castle. Roofs are damaged and crops are at risk!
event_outcome_good: Excellent decision! The situation is under control.
building_sawmill_desc: Increases wood production by 5 per day.
building_farm_desc: Increases food production and housing capacity.
building_warehouse_desc: Increases storage capacity for all resources.
building_hospital_desc: Restores NPC mood and health over time.
confirm_quit: Are you sure you want to quit?
confirm_new_game: Start a new game? Current progress will be lost.
tutorial_welcome_desc: You have inherited a small territory. Your people look to you for guidance. Let me show you the basics of ruling your domain.
tutorial_resources_desc: These are your resources: Wood, Food, and Gold. Keep them balanced to grow your territory and keep your people happy.
tutorial_npc_desc: Tap on Aldric, your loyal vassal. He can carry out your commands and provide counsel.
tutorial_command_desc: Type a command for your vassal. Try something like 'Gather wood from the forest' or 'Scout the nearby lands'.
tutorial_build_desc: Tap the Build button to construct buildings. A Farm will produce food for your people each day.
tutorial_worldmap_desc: The World Map shows neighboring territories. As you grow stronger, you can expand through diplomacy or conquest.
tutorial_complete_desc: You now know the basics. Rule wisely, Little Lord. Your decisions shape the fate of your people.
tech_iron_working_desc: Craft iron weapons for your soldiers.
tech_crossbow_desc: Long-range weapon capable of piercing heavy armor.
tech_siege_weapons_desc: Construct trebuchets and battering rams for conquests.
tech_cavalry_desc: Train mounted knights for rapid raids and flanking.
tech_trade_routes_desc: Establish profitable trade networks with distant lands.
tech_banking_desc: Manage gold reserves and offer loans.
tech_masonry_desc: Cut and shape stone for stronger fortifications.
tech_architecture_desc: Advanced building design for larger, more efficient structures.
tech_code_of_laws_desc: Written laws reduce corruption and increase loyalty.
tech_herbalism_desc: Use herbs for healing and food preservation.
tech_astrology_desc: Read the stars for agricultural timing and event prediction.
activity_farmer_harvest: harvesting wheat in the morning mist
activity_farmer_store: storing the morning harvest in the granary
activity_farmer_plant: planting new seeds in the furrows
activity_soldier_training: training with the sword at dawn
activity_merchant_trading: trading goods at the market stall
activity_vassal_advising: reviewing petitions in the great hall
activity_scout_observing: observing the horizon from the watchtower
activity_builder_constructing: laying bricks on a new building
activity_chatting: chatting with neighbors in the square
research_scholar_no_llm: The scholar nods and retreats to the library...
research_scholar_fallback: The scholar considers many possibilities and begins a promising study...
steward_no_llm: The steward nods and begins reassigning workers.
